Company: The name of the company. For this insight, it should be 'Elexion Automotive'.
Month_Year: The month and year when the update was made. For this insight, it should be 'September 2024'.
Avg_Update_Time_Seconds: The average time in seconds it took for a sales representative to update a lead's status in the CRM software. For this insight, it is 45 seconds.
